objective: Extend analysis-by-synthesis fitting to public references: estimate per-source card pose, light direction, glare center, light hardness, exposure scale, and confidence weight; fit ONE profile across all usable observations; reject profiles that match only one privileged reference; emit per-reference candidate renders, difference images, regional error, highlight-trajectory comparison for sequences/video, cross-reference consistency score, and an outlier report.
current_state: Schema frozen by two-lane-p0-state-machine (docs/agent-ops/reference-fitting-report.schema.json). Physical-lane fitting.py and the deterministic render sequence scripts exist and must remain untouched; this is a new module.
assumptions: Inputs conform to the frozen bundle/appearance schemas; tests synthesize multi-source observation fixtures.
Renderer evaluation may reuse fitting.py public API read-only; deterministic planar card geometry only — no geometry inference from photos.
acceptance_criteria: Single profile fitted jointly across all usable sources with per-source confidence weights; deterministic given fixed inputs.
A profile whose error is low on exactly one reference and high elsewhere is rejected with single_reference_overfit_flag and named privileged references (dedicated test).

Report includes per-source estimates, difference images, regional error, highlight-trajectory comparison when sequential frames exist, cross-reference consistency score, aggregate loss, and outlier report; validates against the frozen schema.
Profile file hash (blake3) bound into the report.
No output claims physical measurement; labels restricted to reference-derived vocabulary.
required_tests: uv run ruff check src tests
stop_conditions: The observed material response exceeds what the renderer model can represent (record diagnostic; do not extend the renderer here).
Any requirement would need edits outside allowed_paths.
expected_outputs: Overfit-rejection, determinism, consistency-score, and schema tests
